title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
